executives.name: Corey Dias
executives.background: Mr. Dias has over 20 years of experience in the capital markets and has held senior positions at several investment banks. He has also served as a director and officer of several public companies.

executives.name: Peter Smerchanski
executives.background: Mr. Smerchanski is a professional engineer with over 40 years of experience in the mining industry. He has served as a director and officer of several public companies.

executives.name: Teresa Cherry
executives.background: Ms. Cherry has over 20 years of experience in the mining industry and has held senior positions at several public companies. She is a Chartered Professional Accountant.
